title: I Turned Cheap Cloud Storage Into a 1PB Local Drive (With JuiceFS)
summary: JuiceFS is a POSIX-compliant virtual file system that layers multi-tiered caching on top of cloud object storage like AWS S3 to deliver local-drive performance at cloud scale. The demo shows setup with Redis metadata storage, local NVMe caching, and real-time performance monitoring via Prometheus integration.
